name: browsershell
description: A shell for your browser — tabs, bookmarks, history, and page actions as terminal commands.
author: Jamal Yusuf

scripts.build: tsx scripts/generate-icons.ts && npm run typecheck && vite build && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts && vite build --config vite.background.config.ts && vite build --config vite.page.config.ts && tsx scripts/postbuild.ts
scripts.website: npm run generate-docs && npm run sync-website && npm run website:static && hugo server --source website --port 1313
scripts.website:build: npm run generate-docs && npm run sync-website && npm run website:static && hugo --minify --cleanDestinationDir --source website && npm run website:check-links
